name: Z-MCBURB
purpose: Keep Z-Sanctuary resilient when files, reports, registries, dashboards, or project spines drift, duplicate, break, disappear, or split across folders — without silently overwriting source truth.

backup_domains.description: Generated JSON/MD under data/reports and sibling receipt paths.
Canonical JSON registries and manifests under data/ and dashboard data.
Docs, cross-project links, AI Builder pack, Monster map, Zuno snapshot chain.
Multi-root / Organiser alignment; PC root catalog baselines where used.
Whale Bus / sync pack outputs when chartered — metadata movement only until gate.

reconvergence_allowed_modes.description: Read-only scans and JSON/MD status; default for Phase MCBURB-1.
Emit human-readable reconvergence suggestions in reports; no apply.
Any merge, relink, copy-back, or overwrite requires explicit AMK/human gate and rollback plan.

related_systems.role: command and check layer for scripted resilience
large data or event movement spine when chartered
backup and reflection trail (symbolic + operational receipts)
anomaly and out-of-pattern signals — advisory only in Phase 1
autonomy limits; MCBURB stays read-only until gate

future_outputs_note: Phase MCBURB-2+ may add scripts/z_mcburb_status.mjs writing data/reports/z_mcburb_backup_reconvergence_status.{json,md} — not part of Phase MCBURB-1.
